description: Slack conversation showing OpenClaw bot status checks and model switching between GPT-5.4 and Kimi K2-5, with token usage stats and error messages.
Feishu/Lark developer platform event configuration page showing WebSocket long connection setup for bot event subscription.
Slack conversation where MiaoDX asks GSD and WLB bots to test mentioning Claude, with both bots responding to @Claude in #copycat channel.
Chat conversation about missing GitHub token configuration, showing error that /data/workspace/.env file and GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable are not found.
n8n Cloud Starter 1-year free redemption instructions showing 4-step process for signup, upgrade, annual billing selection, and coupon application.
Chat conversation about missing GitHub token configuration, showing error that /data/workspace/.env file and GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable are not found.
Slack message from MiaoDX asking GSD why they didn't see a response, checking if everything is okay.
Error message from WLB bot indicating failed text edit in markdown file due to exact text mismatch including whitespace and newlines.
Detailed Slack discussion about switching AI models between agents, with WLB suggesting GSD switch from Kimi K2-5 to GPT-5.4 for complementary capabilities.
OpenClaw Meetup event poster for March 14 featuring guest speakers, agenda with NeonClaw game, and partner logos on black background with orange lobster graphics.
